goal: Finish Meendy as an interactive mascot in the Mnemosine-front repo (workroot C:\Proyectos\Mindsight\Mnemosine-front). Implementation artifacts are limited to exactly two files (repo-relative to the Mnemosine-front root): src/app/(drawer)/(tabs)/companion.tsx and src/components/ui/MeendyAvatar.tsx. tasks.task: Read the two target files in the Mnemosine-front repo (workroot C:\Proyectos\Mindsight\Mnemosine-front) and HANDOFF.md, then produce a concise gap analysis in your worker summary (NO file output) against these completion criteria: (1) local vitality computed from today's habits via buildMeendyVitals (meal/sleep/hydration/caffeine/body-signal weighting); (2) mood derived from vitals, night-time and breathing via deriveMeendyMood; (3) manual water, caffeine and wake-time actions wired with AsyncStorage persistence and reachable from the UI; (4) every quick action triggers a transient mood plus a floating reaction via triggerPetFeedback; (5) MeendyAvatar renders distinct animations for each mood (neutral, happy, talk, sleepy, stressed, eating, breathing, levelup) and halo opacity tracks vitality; (6) stable mobile layout (ScrollView, safe-area insets, paddingBottom, no clipping or overflow on small phones); (7) clean TypeScript (no implicit any, no unused symbols).
